documents.title: Index - OpenClaw
documents.summary: OpenClaw is a platform that connects messaging platforms like WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, and iMessage to AI coding agents such as Pi, enabling users to send messages and receive agent responses through various channels. It provides a gateway service for managing connections and integrates with web interfaces and mobile applications.

documents.title: Lore - OpenClaw
documents.summary: This document narrates the origin story and evolution of 'OpenClaw', detailing its name changes from Warelay to Clawd to Molty to its final form, along with community involvement and key characters like Molty and Peter.

documents.title: Openclaw - OpenClaw
documents.summary: This document provides a comprehensive guide for setting up a personal assistant using OpenClaw, a multi-platform messaging gateway for Pi agents. It covers safety considerations, prerequisites, the recommended two-phone setup, quick start instructions, workspace configuration, and advanced settings for creating an operational assistant.
